input_text: A garden wall was high. No penguin can fly. Eve sent Tom a long letter. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The stone was heavy. Mice are afraid of cats. If X1 is not a parent of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. Agatha is in trouble. John is nice. The man carrying a bag waved. A kitchen door was open. Bears eat all boxers. Elephant's head is green. Mary journeyed to the bathroom. The bike is small. Earth contains Europe. The owner of the horse of Mike smiled. Is it false that John is nice?
